case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. SEAN I HALE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFFS DECLARATION / AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT [C.C.P. 585 (D)] (TRANSACTION ID # 100138802) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100159581) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HALE, SEAN I

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-27-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALE, SEAN I $1,963.92 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,963.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100138802)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-23-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-27-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK SERVED MAR-09-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-10-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT HALE, SEAN I
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-28-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO TARGET NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT HALE, SEAN I DOES 1 TO 15 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-03-2020
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100138802) FILED BY ATTORNEY PATENAUDE, RAYMOND A.
